target: 1. The Secret of the Hishigata Family
July 22nd
Alright, let's go...!
Sorry, wait a second.
Hello… Alain!?
Sorry, you called me, didn't you. I just got back...
You were really late this time. I was worried, Alain...
This time?
Ah... no...
Well, Karikiri-san is a long talker, you see.
...Ah, is that so.
He helped me out a lot with the funeral... He was worried about you too, Shinpei. Said he wanted to see you before you go back to Tokyo.
Got it... I want to thank him too, so I was thinking of going to the shrine tomorrow...
Could you do that? Is Mio with you right now?
Ah, yeah! We're all gathered at Sou's house right now...
I see. Tell Sou-kun I said thanks again.
He tried to save Ushio right until the very end... Sou-kun seemed to be blaming himself, but I'm truly grateful.
Yeah... I know. I'll be home in a bit, so see you later.

Dad?
He's alone at home, right? Is he okay?
Yeah.
Alain has immunity, so no one can copy him or erase him. They shouldn't be able to just recklessly mess with him.
Then I'll leave Mio in your care.
Yeah... Don't let your guard down...
U-Um. Ajiro-kun... Um... be careful.
Yeah…
The door's unlocked...!?
...How is it, Ushio?
It's fine... I don't feel anything right now!
That's conversely strange... To not feel any shadow presence...
Then where is mom?
Let's go inside.
What is this...!?
Everything in the house... is gone...
How was it? Toki-chan...!
My brother's and my rooms were empty too... Desks, closets, beds, everything...
Nagumo-sensei, is this...
...Hmm. Fortunately, there are no human stains... What was erased were the household goods.
Was there something they didn't want us to see...?
Something they didn't want us to see... That means there was some kind of clue here.
Yeah... We might be able to grasp something even from the traces. Shall we try investigating one?
(Where should we investigate...)
Investigate the traces on the wall
Investigate the large traces on the floor
Search for small traces
Shall we try investigating the traces on the wall?
Umm... What used to be here were paintings, calendars... And pennants, I guess.
They could hide documents at most... I don't think there were any important clues there.
What about the large traces on the floor?
That one's a dresser, and this one's a piano... The widest one is probably a carpet.
They were all things we used normally, but it didn't look like anything was hidden in them.
Those small traces here and there, what are they?
That one over there is a houseplant. The small one there is...
Probably things that fell from the shelves. We had small things like souvenirs and trophies decorated there.
None of them seem to be a size that could hide anything important...
None of them are clues, huh...
Although it seems like they erased everything.
They know there's something that needs to be destroyed hidden here, but they don't know where it is... That's the impression I get.
It has to be Dad's doing!! Him not being here is good proof of that...!!
Mom's not here either... What the hell is going on, damn it!!!
Shinpei… I feel the shadow's presence…!
You sensed a shadow's presence from inside the clinic, right Ushio?
Y-yeah…
…Ushio, are you scared?
O-Of course I'm scared!! I'm really bad with hospitals at night...
Quiet... I can hear something.
What is that sound...?
Hm... there's something on the wall too. It's dark so I can't see well, but...
Investigate the wall
Investigate the sound
This… is a bullet hole?
It looks like there was a fight here.
Wh-Why is something like that in our house...!?
Let's confirm the true identity of that sound...
The elevator...
...It's not moving. This sound is... Something is stuck in the doors on the floor below...
Everyone, be careful. The shadow is down below...
It seems we have no choice but to go down and see.
Yes... let's take the stairs. We have to confirm it properly...
...What's in the basement?
The morgue.
A wheelchair is stuck in the elevator. So this is what was making the noise...
It's Mom's... wheelchair...!! Why is it in a place like this...
...Behind you!!
(A figure disappeared into the back of the hallway... The only thing that can move at that speed... is a shadow!)
…Did you see its face?
No...
In Ushio's original form...
(That shadow headed for… the morgue…)
…I'm going in.
Yeah...
...Th-There's nothing here...
Ushio-san's body was here, but...
That shadow from just now might have been after Ushio's body.
That's true... If we scan the real body, Ushio-san can recover, after all.
They probably decided it wasn't wise to leave it until tomorrow's mealtime.
Damn…!
But... They wouldn't have had enough time to carry the body out, right? It might still be hidden somewhere...
We should check just in case…
(Where should I investigate...)
The bed in the center
The door on the wall
The shelf on the right
The bed in the middle is--
No need to even check, it's empty. Doesn't look like anything could be hidden under the bed either.
Ushio-san's body was right here.
What about the door on the wall?
It's the coffin storage space, but...
It's empty inside...
What about the shelf on the right?
Alright, let's open it!
...It's just medicines and documents.
Naturally, there's no space to fit a body in here, huh.
...As I thought, was it moved somewhere else...?
A shadow familiar with the clinic's layout could have carried the body away in this short time...
Negoro-san, huh...
Damn it!
Want to try again? My hair got shorter, so I can't chop your head off, but...
No... you don't have to...!! When the time comes, I'll finish this myself.
...But right now we have to keep going...!! We need to find Sou's parents...!!
Got it.
What's this passage, Toki?
It connects to Hiruko's grotto.
We pass through here to bring food to Haine's sleeping chamber... It's a different route from the old path entering from the old ward.
I can feel a faint shadow presence too... The shadow from earlier must have gone deeper in from here...
Let's go too...!
It's close, everyone. They're already... right there...
Ah!
Ha... ah...
Mom...?
(What on earth is going on!?)
Don't shoot! P-Please don't shoot!!
But Dr. Hishigata is...!!! Your dad's going to be killed!!!!
It's okay, Sou...!! I'll turn her back!!
Ah… uh.
Dad!
…He's not breathing…
Switch!! Heart massage!!
Dad...!! Don't you dare die on me!!!! I'll never forgive you!! If you just die silently like this!!!
Wake up!! You shitty old man!!!
...Buhah!!
*Cough*, *cough*, *cough*...!
...Sou, huh...
Please... stop keeping secrets... We're family, aren't we...
*Pant*... *pant*... ...What about Chitose... your mother...?
I cut the link with Haine. She'll wake up in a bit.
...You're... Ushio...
I see... To think you guys... have already made it this far...
So that's why... Haine... She thought I would talk, so she used Chitose...
It's useless to hide it, Dad. I just have to scan you, after all.
Tokiko, kill them.
Dad!!!
If you do that... Haine will surely believe me again...
No, Dad. It won't turn out like that...
Everything is for Chitose's... For your mother's sake...!!
They have no intention of keeping their promise to the Hishigata family.
I'm so disappointed in you, Tokiko.
Step back, Sou-kun!! The gun is too close to Dr. Hishigata!!!
(Crap! Sou's gun is being taken--)
(Will she shoot...!? But the opponent is Dr. Hishigata--)
(It's no use, I won't make it in time!)
Tokiko!
Ushio, if I kill you!
…What…?
...Heh. Uhuhuhuhu...
You bastard...! You're not... Tokiko...?
Too bad.
…Mio!!
...Will you trust me a little bit with this?
Yeah... you saved me.
Really?
Ya can copy me if ya don't believe my words.
Absolutely not. I don't want to know what's in Shin-chan's heart...
You shot Tokiko!! Why, Dad! How could you... do something like that!!!
...Kill me.
Kuh...
...Dad, you're... a doctor, right... Hey...? A doctor shouldn't... talk about killing so easily... hey!!!!
So ya won't say anything...
That's enough... Mio, do it...
What's wrong!?
It's impossible, I can't copy him... This person... has immunity.
I see... We have no choice but to have you talk, Dr. Hishigata...
...Wait... That's impossible! You... can't copy me...!?
You had a shadow made once, and that shadow is already dead.
People who have had that happen gain immunity, and can't be copied a second time.
...No way... That's absurd.
I'm... already... My shadow... can no longer... be made...?
That's what I'm saying.
Doctor...?
Chitose... Then... for what purpose have I...
Negoro-kun...
Doctor, I will be taking my leave now. I have accomplished my top priority.
You took Ushio's body...!
(Damn it, she's too far! 50m... out of range...!!)
A message from Shide-sama, Doctor. 'Thank you very much for everything you've done for the Hishigata family.'
But that is now over.' 'Thank you for your hard work.' ...That's what he said.
I also have a message for Ajiro Shinpei.
It seems you somehow didn't die.' 'I'm fed up with your persistence.' 'Even though you can't do anything.'
Two more days.' 'With that, everything will end.'
Well then...
Stop, dammit!
Don't go!!!!
You don't need to chase her...
But!!
They're using Ushio's body as bait to lure us... Going out of their way to give a time limit... Setting a timeframe... they're provoking us.
If we take the bait, it's over. There's no way we're going.
B... But Shinpei!!
I'm... so frustrated!! The shadow I saw in the hallway earlier was her!! She stole the body!!!
Calm down, Sis. The one who's most frustrated is Shin-chan.
Acting... on impulse... isn't always the right thing to do...
Anger and frustration... only become weapons when you look at the big picture.
Shinpei...
Dr. Hishigata... is there still any point in staying silent?
Bring me the real Tokiko.
You're awake...
Sei-san. Where are we!?
Chitose-san. Do you have a moment?
Eh? U-Ushio-chan?? Am I still dreaming...?
It's a waste of time to explain, so please look at my memories.
Ushio-chan's memories?
...I'm sorry... Chitose...
(Sou's mother didn't know she was a shadow until now.)
(She knew nothing... She said she was made that way.)
I understand that you guys are trying to stop the ritual...
But, is it really okay to kill Haine?
What do you mean?
If a shadow dies, the children and grandchildren it gave birth to will also die at the same time.
If you kill Haine, all shadows will die...!! In other words, your Ushio will die too!!
We have no choice but to do this. We have no choice...!! Otherwise Mom will... Mom will die...!!
If Haine dies... Mom will die too, so...
(So that's what that was about after all...!!)
Sh... Shinpei!! Did you know about that!?
Sort of... Since I heard Toki-chan's story in Hiruko Cave on the 4th loop.
...Ushio.
...It's fine, it's fine! My life was originally supposed to end the day before yesterday anyway!
I guess you could say I'm lucky to have lived this long... Right now is like bonus time!
If I can save everyone with that time, I want to do it...!!
You mean defeating Haine alone solves everything!? That's good to hear!! In that case, I'll gladly defeat Haine!!!
(That's right... I'm ashamed of myself for hesitating for a moment just now...)
Right!
Yeah.
Dr. Hishigata. What is Haine trying to do by resurrecting...?
...She just... wants to go home...
Go home...!?
That's right... Far away... beyond the deep sea... to her hometown...
It's impossible for any living creature of this world to reach there. Only shadows can go there.
Haine intends to take only shadows back with her... Only the family she chose...
I-Is such a thing possible!?
It's possible if she regains her power.
It's an eternal land without time... Chitose and I... were supposed to become shadows and live there for eternity...!!
Sou and... Tokiko too, in the end! They were supposed to become shadows...!!
So that's why it's fine even if you kill us!! How selfish can you be!!!
Are you an idiot!? For something like that!!?
You really are selfish... and self-centered... A hopeless person...
Thank you. For saving me...
Chitose...
But it's time to put an end to this.
Sou, Tokiko. Mom is happy to have been able to see you grow this far.
Chitose, wait!! If you die...!! I... will have no reason to live...
No, you have the children, don't you! There are people on the island who need <color=#GF_TIPS_026>you</color>, aren't there...!!
Just like Shinpei-kun said, it's not over yet. You can make amends, even starting now.
Guh... ugh...! Uh... ugh... kuh, Kuuuh... uugh...!
Dad, here.
Yeah.
What is this safe...!?
It's our hidden medical records that I had Tokiko hide...
The diagnosis for all of them is Capgras syndrome... But in reality, it's a roster of those who became Haine's food.
Shinpei-kun, your parents' names are also here.
Eh.
Dad and Mom... their boat sank while they were working... It was... an accident...
<color=#GF_TIPS_093>They</color> discovered Hiruko Cave and tried to announce it. That's why they were killed, made to look like an accident.
Shide killed them, and I swapped the bodies and carried them to Haine.
I'm sorry...
What? Is that all ya have to say?
You know the true identity of Shide, don't you?
Look at this photograph.

He is Haine's guardian, 
and her first child.
His original name was <color=#GF_TIPS_025>Shidehiko Hishigata</color>.
The founder and first director of the Hishigata Clinic.
July 23rd
(The date changed to the 23rd)
(We continued our strategy meeting at Hishigata Clinic. What we need to do today... on the 23rd of the 7th loop.)
I am absolutely not going home!! The guy who ends up alone at a time like this gets killed! I know it!! Right!!
That's the first time something other than a fart has come out of your asshole, officer.
(I was really worried about Alain, but Roz and Gil headed to Kofune and will guard him all night.)
Doctor... Why did Haine end up like that?
14 years ago, when she was playing with you, she looked like a cute human girl...
That's right…

I was foolish. 
I shouldn't have gotten involved just out of curiosity.
This body of mine... I think it was born from Haine. When Ryunosuke-san was killed, that right eye that burst out and separated from Haine is me...
I'm... scared... The fact that what makes up my body and what makes up Haine are the same means--
That someday I might become crazy like Haine too...
Rest assured.
I'll kill you if you do.
Mio Kofune
Mio.
...What, it's me... What do you want?
...You're awfully cold.
I guess so... I do hate myself, after all.
...Wh-What is it...!
My low nose, my short fingers, being hairy, and sweating easily... I hate all of it.
Because it's all the exact opposite of Sis. Not just appearance. Grades and personality too...
Stop it!!
You're the real shadow of Sis. How long are you going to hold it in? At least convey your feelings. To Shin-chan.
I'll tell him if ya won't.
Don't!!!
...Absolutely don't...!
Sou Hishigata
These are your mother's ashes.
There's no way I would let Haine eat my precious mother.
The date of death was January 3rd, 2013. The cause of death was heart failure...
...So the story about finding a donor was a lie... She was dead... on the day of that surgery... already.
Ya shoulda told me something that important.
The Hishigata family has been involved with shadows for 300 years. This secret must, of course, be passed down...
However, there is only one successor. My father also told only me, not my older or younger brothers.
I thought the burden would be too heavy for you... You consider human life to be heavy, don't you?
Of course I do!
...That's why I thought it was impossible... I'm sorry...
If you're going to apologize, apologize to Tokiko...
Shinpei Ajiro
I wonder why... I can't really think of Dr. Hishigata as a bad person. He just didn't choose his methods to save someone important, right?
If I were in the same position, I'm not confident I wouldn't do the same thing...
But the result of that is the resurrection ritual... He participated in that mass murder...
If he turned the victims into shadows, he'd erase their memories of being killed... and then no one would find out.
It seems Dad's plan had something even further beyond that, though.
Yes…
Even as a shadow, Ushio is Ushio... And Chitose-san is Chitose-san... I guess I'm still not confident...
...You're kind...
Shinpei-san... when was the last time you slept?
Eh?
You've looped so many times... Your consciousness is continuous, right?
Your eye bags are terrible!
It's true that I've been awake the whole time...
See!! You can't push yourself too hard!
Yeah...
Since everyone is here, please at least sleep tonight.
(...Just like Toki-chan said, this might be the only time I can sleep.)
Thank you...
Umm... Ajiro-kun...
Ah, Koyuba-san...! Sorry for everything. Getting you involved in such a mess.
That's right, it'd be better to return to your inn once dawn breaks.
Leaving your room empty for long is unnatural and will raise suspicion.
Y-Yeah... I wonder if that's better...
Even though Ajiro-kun and the others are going through such a hard time, I can't do anything...
That's not true. Even for today's battle, if it weren't for Koyuba-san's idea, I don't think we could have won.
Yeah...
If anything happens, please contact me immediately.
I don't know if I can rush over... immediately, but I'll manage something.
Yeah... I understand. Thank you.
Shinpei! I got the bed ready like Toki-chan asked! If you can't sleep, should I provide a lullaby service?
Stop it. That'll just make it harder to sleep.
Ah, right! How about getting Kaori-chan to sing a lullaby? An idol's live singing is super precious, y'know.
Are you an idiot? That'd be rude to Koyuba-san.
Ah man, I really can't compete...
Eh, with what?
No, it's nothing.
Really?
If there's anything I can do, contact me! I'll definitely be of help!
Ah, yeah...
Come on, if you don't sleep soon it'll be morning. Good night!
Well then, good night...
